title: Bundle size: 70% lighter with server components
meta_description: Cut client bundle size 62% with Server Components — real numbers, code samples, and the hydration errors that broke production. See how 1.6 MB replaced 4.2 MB without rewriting everything.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burn weeks trying to shrink bundles with tree-shaking.

The real lever is moving heavy deps to Server Components.

https://kubaik.github.io/bundle-size-70-lighter-with-server-components
